text_block_list.text:
While on the way to get something I left at the
training track...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Passerby
text_block_list.text:
There's an All Rep Showdown happening in the
gym! We have to hurry and support Baku!
My interest sparked, I peek into the gymnasium...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I'll definitely be
victorious!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Do your best, Baku! Show them your top speed!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's my line! As head and representative of the
disciplinary committee, I'm gonna turn you to
dust!

text_block_list.name: Disciplinary Committee Members
text_block_list.text: So coooool! I got chills!

...I was going to just get the thing I'd forgotten,
but instead I stumbled across some absurd
showdown!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Have you come to cheer me on?!
choice_data_list:
Actually, I was just on my way to get something
I'd left behind...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
What are the chances! To think you'd just happen
upon the locale of a battle that will go down in
history!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The All Rep Showdown is what separates the
good from the great when it comes to student
function representatives! Until now, every battle
has ended in a draw!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Today's winner will be crowned the strongest
representative! But...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We need to decide our battleground. This is our
fiftieth battle, and we're running out of showdown
themes...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're right! Actually... Trainer, Just a moment
ago, you said you were on your way to pick up
something you'd left behind, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How about the person who picks up my trainer's
forgotten item and returns back here with it first
is the winner?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No objections here! Lending a hand is part of our
duties! Which makes this the ideal stage for a
battle between model students!

And so, the curtain draws on the All Rep
Showdown...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course it is me who'd be victorious! The
championship's title of "retrieving Trainer's lost
property fastest" is all mine!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! I lost! I barely even saw her for a few
seconds before she was gone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That being said! Trainer, I think there's something
else you forgot as well!
choice_data_list: Err, I think you retrieved everything I needed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Do not fear, I will spell it out for you then!
Lately, you've been focusing on putting together
my training schedule and neglecting to eat!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You're the second-most extraordinary person
after me, so it's not like you to forget something
to start with! But it seems the real thing you
forgot is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: To give yourself a break from all the work you do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, that's decided then! First off, we need to
Bakushin some food into that stomach of yours!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So, this is the power of the class rep... I will
concede. I cannot keep up, neither in speed nor
in consideration.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: An absolute rep among reps! I got chills again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the showdown, the huge helping of
yakisoba we devour reminds me of just how big
the class rep's heart is... My heart and stomach
are just filled to the brim!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I did it! With this, I have taken the title of
strongest representative!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Ack! So that was the power of Bakushin! Such terrifying speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh! Indeed! But my trainer is the one who helped
me get there!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Running to help out my trainer made me
remember my usual training routine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You've helped me out so much! It feels satisfying
to return the favor by returning your forgotten
item!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Agh! I was totally defeated! But I'm also touched
by the bond you two share!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: What an emotional rollercoaster! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The victor, Sakura Bakushin O, continues to be
showered with celebratory cheers!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Uuugh... To think... my Bakushin would be
outdone...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
This is the power of the head of the disciplinary
committee! The seat of strongest representative is
now mine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It can't be... It can't!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But it's fine! My loss will help me achieve a new
and more powerful Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely win next time! I'll let you warm the
seat for me until then!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... That's precisely what makes you such an
incredible class representative!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Class Rep! That was a spectacular battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's intense passion earns her a
round of applause from everyone in the
gymnasium.
